pillarNarratives.label: Attract talent
pillarNarratives.headline: ATTRACT TALENT
progress: Interview tools and analytics dashboards finalized
50/228 specialized roles hired (22/60 Development; 14/29 PDE; 14/139 T&I)
risks: Relatively slower hiring for specialized roles in T&I (14/139)
Delays in EVP, benefits, and policy finalization
mitigations: Strengthen external sourcing for roles in T&I
Scenario-based hiring strategy and diversified action plans

pillarNarratives.label: Develop leaders
pillarNarratives.headline: DEVELOP LEADERS
progress: Talent reviews for N-1s/N-2s completed and succession actions defined
Leadership Development Program (Track 1–4) launched with first cohort starting April 20th
Goal-setting process launched with interim system in place and training sessions conducted
risks: Limited clarity on successor readiness and gaps
Leadership program capacity and funding constraints
Compressed timeline and mindset shift constraint for performance rollout
mitigations: External support brought in for design of success profiles and building internal capability
Careful planning on LDP dates and cohorts; CEO approval for LDP funding
Phased performance sprints rollout with leadership and HR team capability building and IT alignment

pillarNarratives.label: Build pipeline
pillarNarratives.headline: BUILD PIPELINE
progress: Future Leaders Program direction aligned and design underway
Talent review process launched and feeding into Succession Planning pipeline
Tracking dashboards under development with interim data sources in place
risks: Capability gaps within HR team to deliver FLP and incubate talent
Talent Management system not fully ready and requires customization
mitigations: Hire from the PDP program in 2026 and selective opportunistic graduate hiring
HRIS working to customize the Talent and Succession system to meet Talent Management needs

nextSteps.action: Enterprise-wide goal setting and CDP launched via ORACLE
End-to-end performance and development cycle to be redesigned
Follow up on MC talent review with clear action plan defined
Design success profiles for all critical roles and compare successors
Formalize career and development plans for 88 unique successors
Finalize nomination for LDP tracks with business input
Launch Module 1 across Tracks 1–4 of LDP
Future Leaders Program design in progress
Assessment center execution prepared for PDP participants/applicants
Recruitment strategy for external hiring defined
Continue building capability within HR and managers
Prioritize talent and succession management system solution to facilitate talent movement

priorityInitiatives.name: Talent Acquisition
priorityInitiatives.footnote: Calculated average % from milestone level; planned completion % as of April 13, 2026
challenges: Regional geopolitical situation continues to impact hiring and candidate mobility
Delays in finalizing key enablers for hiring (EVP, benefits & policies)
Hiring of specialized technology roles (14/139 currently hired)
mitigants: Proactive development of responses and actions to support int'l hires across different scenarios
Internal alignment on finalizing EVP and strengthen narratives and policies
Increasing external search capabilities for specialized tech. roles

priorityInitiatives.name: Succession-ready bench of 100–200 future leaders
priorityInitiatives.footnote: Calculated average % from milestone level; planned completion % as of April 14, 2026
challenges: Challenge in comparing successors to success profiles to determine real readiness and gaps
Decision required: Signoff on H&S support in designing success profiles relevant for 2030 ambitions
mitigants: Contacted H&S for consulting support on the design of success profiles and building internal capability

priorityInitiatives.name: NEOM Academy | Leadership Development Program
priorityInitiatives.footnote: Calculated average % from milestone level; planned completion % as of April 14, 2026
challenges: Delivering 5 tracks at the same time will require participants out of the business for an extended time
Approval required of SAR 120M for the leadership program delivery
mitigants: Careful planning of all dates, cohorts and alignment with the business
Decision required: CEO signoff on completed business case for funding requirements

priorityInitiatives.name: Integrated Performance Management
priorityInitiatives.footnote: Calculated average % from milestone level; planned completion % as of April 13, 2026
challenges: Compressed implementation timeline for Performance mgmt. and mindset shift required from HR, managers, and leaders
Deliver process in short sprints: goal setting, continuous conversation, tech. enablement, appraisal and calibration
mitigants: Establish clear expectation and share with both IT & Procurement leaders
Build capability within leaders and line managers, and upskill HR

priorityInitiatives.name: Future Leaders Program
priorityInitiatives.footnote: Calculated average % from milestone level; planned completion % as of April 14, 2026
challenges: A new team structure and relevant capabilities required
Alignment with the business on rotations, funding and time off for intense development required
Delay in completing the compensation and benefits survey may result in an uncompetitive rewards offering
mitigants: Hire from the PDP program in 2026 and opportunistic graduate hiring through social media and select schools

priorityInitiatives.name: Talent Management Redesign
priorityInitiatives.footnote: Calculated average % from milestone level; planned completion % as of April 14, 2026
challenges: Talent Management system solution is still in design and requires customization
mitigants: HRIS working to customize the Talent and Succession system to meet Talent Management needs
